description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a low stone wall and landscaped with palm trees. The structure features a flat roof with multiple levels and skylights, and a combination of white and natural wood exterior finishes. Large floor-to-ceiling windows dominate one side, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoor patio area. The front includes a wide driveway leading to a double garage with a prominent entryway. The rear of the bungalow has a partially covered patio with a pergola and additional glass doors. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a minimalist aesthetic typical of contemporary architecture.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white and wood finishes, large windows, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a stone wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, and a paved driveway with palm trees and a stone wall.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the covered patio with a pergola, grouped windows, and landscaped backyard.
description_view_2: Side view displaying expansive floor-to-ceiling windows and a patio area adjacent to the stone wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring a secondary entrance, wood paneling, and a large paved area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
